description: Cutting-edge stack — React 19 + Router 7 + Zod 4 family.

deps.router: 7 (react-router@^7.0.0 — package renamed from react-router-dom; library mode, v6-compatible API; framework mode is a separate initiative)

bundler.comment: React 19 — identical bundler policy to v2 (same React major). The v3 delta vs v2 is router 6->7 (package rename, handled by the generator's routerPackageForStack seam) and zod 3->4 + resolvers 3->5; none of those need bundler-side wiring (esm.sh resolves the bare specifiers).
